MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-06-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTED SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED.GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION TO APPROVE THE TRANSFER OF THE PORTION OF THE STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT COVERED DISCUSSED IN THE PETITION, SUCH PORTION SHALL BE ORDERED TRANSFERRED PURSUANT TO THE TRANSFER AGREEMENT BY AND BETWEEN PAYEE, ARIANNA MORAS A/K/A A.M. AND TRANSFEREE, ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC. (SEE INSURANCE CODE SECTIONS 10134, 10136, 10137, 10138 & 10139.5,.) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76205380) FILED BY PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structed Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Jun-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Asset Security Consulting, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structed Settlement is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants the petition to approve the transfer of the portion of the structured settlement covered discussed in the petition, such portion shall be ordered transferred pursuant to the Transfer Agreement by and between Payee, ARIANNA MORAS a/k/a A.M. and Transferee, ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC. (See Insurance Code sections 10134, 10136, 10137, 10138 & 10139.5,.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
